summary: Frontend-only testing completed for registration onboarding flow with email OTP verification. Key functionality working: OTP dialog appears after registration instead of immediate dashboard redirect.

ui_bugs.issue: Language switcher dropdown with 'EN' text is not clickable/accessible in automated testing

integration_issues.issue: Password and Confirm Password fields not detected as type='password' in initial DOM state during automated testing, though visually present

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly at pod URL
Registration form loads with all required fields (First Name, Last Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password, Sign Up button)
✅ KEY SUCCESS: OTP verification dialog appears after clicking Sign Up (NOT immediate redirect to dashboard)
OTP dialog shows correct elements: 6 input fields, Resend Code button, Check and Add button
preventClose=true working: Dialog cannot be closed by clicking outside or pressing Escape
Login page loads correctly with email input and continue button
Login flow email validation working (shows appropriate error messages)
No critical errors or crashes found
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes needed: 1) Make language switcher more accessible for testing, 2) Investigate password field type detection issue. The core registration OTP flow is working correctly as required.
success_percentage: frontend: 85% - Core functionality working, minor UI accessibility issues
